info.description: Stanley Black & Decker, Inc. engages in the provision of power and hand tools, and related accessories, products, services and equipment for oil and gas, infrastructure applications, commercial electronic security and monitoring systems, healthcare solutions, and mechanical access solutions. It operates through the Tools and Outdoor and Industrial segments. The Tools and Outdoor segment refers to power tools, hand tools, accessories and storage, and outdoor power equipment product lines. The Industrial segment includes the engineered fastening and infrastructure businesses. The company was founded by Frederick T. Stanley in 1843 and is headquartered in New Britain, CT.
info.description_zh: Stanley Black & Decker, Inc. 從事為石油和天然氣、基礎設施應用、商業電子安全和監控系統、醫療保健解決方案和機械通道解決方案提供電動和手動工具以及相關配件、產品、服務和設備。它透過工具、戶外和工業部門運作。工具和戶外部門涉及電動工具、手動工具、配件和儲存以及戶外動力設備產品線。工業部門包括工程緊固和基礎設施業務。該公司由 Frederick T. Stanley 於 1843 年創立，總部位於康乃狄克州新不列顛。

info.description: Invesco Ltd. engages in the investment management business. Its products include mutual funds, unit trusts, exchange-traded funds, closed-end funds, and retirement plans. The company was founded in December 1935 and is headquartered in Atlanta, GA.
info.description_zh: Invesco Ltd.從事投資管理業務。其產品包括共同基金、單位信託、交易所交易基金、封閉式基金和退休計畫。該公司成立於 1935 年 12 月，總部位於喬治亞州亞特蘭大。

info.description: Keurig Dr Pepper, Inc. engages in the manufacture, marketing, distribution, and sales of non-alcoholic beverages. It operates through the following segments: U.S. Refreshment Beverages, U.S. Coffee, and International. The U.S. Refreshment Beverages segment manufactures and distributes beverage concentrates, syrups, and finished beverages including the brands Dr Pepper, Canada Dry, Mott's, Snapple, A&W, 7UP, Sunkist soda, Squirt, Hawaiian Punch, Core Hydration, Bai, C4 Energy, Clamato, Evian, Yoo-Hoo, Big Red, and Vita Coco. The U.S. Coffee segment involves single serve brewers, specialty, hot and iced varieties, and ready-to-drink beverages. The International segment includes sales in Canada, Mexico, and other markets. The company was founded in 2018 and is headquartered in Frisco, TX.
info.description_zh: Keurig Dr Pepper, Inc. 從事非酒精飲料的製造、行銷、分銷和銷售。它透過以下部門運作：美國清涼飲料部門、美國咖啡部門和國際部門。美國清涼飲料部門生產和分銷濃縮飲料、糖漿和成品飲料，包括 Dr Pepper、Canada Dry、Mott's、Snapple、A&W、7UP、Sunkist 蘇打水、Squirt、Hawaiian Punch、Core Hydration、Bai、C4 Energy、Clamato、Evian、Yoo-Hoo、Big Red 和 Cococo 等品牌。美國咖啡部門涉及單杯咖啡、特色咖啡、熱飲和冰飲以及即飲飲料。國際部門包括加拿大、墨西哥和其他市場的銷售。該公司成立於 2018 年，總部位於德克薩斯州弗里斯科。

info.description: The Travelers Cos., Inc. is a holding company, which engages in the provision of commercial and personal property and casualty insurance products and services. It operates through the following business segments: Business Insurance, Bond and Specialty Insurance, and Personal Insurance. The Business Insurance segment offers an array of property and casualty insurance, and insurance related services to its customers primarily in the U.S., as well as in Canada, the United Kingdom, the Republic of Ireland and throughout other parts of the world as a corporate member of Lloyd's. The Bond and Specialty Insurance segment includes surety, fidelity, management of liability, professional liability, and other property and casualty coverage and related risk management services. The Personal Insurance segment is involved in a range of property and casualty insurance products and services covering individuals' personal risks, primarily in the U.S. and Canada. The company was founded in 1853 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.industry_zh: 保險 - 財產與意外傷害
info.description_zh: The Travelers Cos., Inc. 是一家控股公司，從事提供商業和個人財產及傷亡保險產品和服務。它透過以下業務部門運作：商業保險、債券和專業保險以及個人保險。商業保險部門作為勞合社的企業會員，主要向美國、加拿大、英國、愛爾蘭共和國和世界其他地區的客戶提供一系列財產和傷亡保險以及保險相關服務。債券和專業保險部門包括擔保、保真度、責任管理、專業責任以及其他財產和傷亡保險以及相關風險管理服務。個人保險部門提供一系列涵蓋個人風險的財產和傷亡保險產品和服務，主要在美國和加拿大。該公司成立於 1853 年，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: Procter & Gamble Co. engages in the provision of branded consumer packaged goods. It operates through the following segments: Beauty, Grooming, Health Care, Fabric and Home Care, and Baby, Feminine and Family Care. The Beauty segment offers hair, skin, and personal care. The Grooming segment consists of shave care like female and male blades and razors, pre and post shave products, and appliances. The Health Care segment includes oral care products like toothbrushes, toothpaste, and personal health care such as gastrointestinal, rapid diagnostics, respiratory, and vitamins, minerals, and supplements. The Fabric and Home care segment consists of fabric enhancers, laundry additives and detergents, and air, dish, and surface care. The Baby, Feminine and Family Care segment sells baby wipes, diapers, and pants, adult incontinence, feminine care, paper towels, tissues, and toilet paper. The company was founded by William Procter and James Gamble in 1837 and is headquartered in Cincinnati, OH.
info.description_zh: 寶潔公司 (Procter & Gamble Co.) 從事提供品牌消費品。該公司透過以下部門運作：美容、美容、保健、織物和家庭護理以及嬰兒、女性和家庭護理。美容部門提供頭髮、皮膚和個人護理。美容部門包括剃須護理產品，如女性和男性刀片和剃須刀、剃須前和剃須後產品以及器具。醫療保健部門包括牙刷、牙膏等口腔護理產品，以及胃腸、快速診斷、呼吸、維生素、礦物質和補充劑等個人保健產品。織物和家庭護理領域包括織物增強劑、洗衣添加劑和洗滌劑以及空氣、餐具和表面護理。嬰兒、女性和家庭護理部門銷售嬰兒濕紙巾、尿布和褲子、成人失禁、女性護理、紙巾、紙巾和衛生紙。該公司由 William Procter 和 James Gamble 於 1837 年創立，總部位於俄亥俄州辛辛那提。

info.description: NextEra Energy, Inc. engages in the provision of renewable energy. It operates through the Florida Power and Light Company (FPL) and NextEra Energy Resources and NEET (NEER). The FPL segment involves the generation, transmission, distribution, and sale of electric energy in Florida. The NEER segment produces electricity from clean and renewable sources, including wind and solar. The company was founded on December 28, 1925 and is headquartered in Juno Beach, FL.
info.industry_zh: 公用事業 - 受監管的電力
info.description_zh: NextEra Energy, Inc. 從事再生能源的供應。它透過佛羅裡達電力和照明公司 (FPL) 以及 NextEra Energy Resources 和 NEET (NEER) 運作。 FPL 部門涉及佛羅裡達州的發電、輸電、配電和銷售電能。 NEER 部門利用清潔和再生能源（包括風能和太陽能）生產電力。該公司成立於 1925 年 12 月 28 日，總部位於佛羅裡達州朱諾海灘。

info.description: The Cigna Group is a global health company, which engages in the provision of global health services. It operates through the following segments: Evernorth Health Services, Cigna Healthcare, Other Operations, and Corporate. The Evernorth Health Services segment partners with health plans, employers, governmental organizations, and health care providers to solve challenges in the areas of pharmacy benefits, home delivery pharmacy, specialty pharmacy, specialty distribution, and care delivery and management solutions. The Cigna Healthcare segment includes the U.S. Healthcare and International Health operating segments, which provide comprehensive medical and coordinated solutions to clients and customers. The Other Operations segment consists of the remainder of business operations, which includes certain ongoing businesses and exited businesses. The Corporate segment refers to net interest expense, certain litigation matters, expense associated with frozen pension plans, charitable contributions, operating severance, certain overhead and enterprise-wide project costs, and eliminations for products and services sold between segments. The company was founded in 1792 and is headquartered in Bloomfield, CT.
info.description_zh: Cigna Group 是一家全球健康公司，致力於提供全球健康服務。它透過以下部門運作：Evernorth Health Services、Cigna Healthcare、其他營運部門和企業部門。 Evernorth Health Services 部門與健康計劃、雇主、政府組織和醫療保健提供者合作，解決藥房福利、送貨上門藥房、專科藥房、專科分銷以及護理服務和管理解決方案等領域的挑戰。 Cigna Healthcare 部門包括美國醫療保健和國際健康營運部門，為客戶和客戶提供全面的醫療和協調解決方案。其他業務部門由其餘業務運作組成，其中包括某些正在進行的業務和已退出的業務。公司部門是指淨利息費用、某些訴訟事項、與凍結退休金計畫相關的費用、慈善捐款、營運遣散費、某些間接費用和企業範圍的專案成本，以及部門之間銷售的產品和服務的抵銷。該公司成立於 1792 年，總部位於康乃狄克州布魯姆菲爾德。

info.description: Coterra Energy Inc. is an independent oil and gas company engaged in the development, exploration and production of oil, natural gas, and Natural Gas Liquids. Its portfolio includes projects in the Permian Basin, the Marcellus Shale, and the Anadarko Basin. Coterra Energy was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.industry_zh: 石油和天然氣勘探與生產
info.description_zh: Coterra Energy Inc.是一家獨立的石油和天然氣公司，從事石油、天然氣和液化天然氣的開發、勘探和生產。其投資組合包括二疊紀盆地、馬塞勒斯頁岩和阿納達科盆地的計畫。 Coterra Energy 成立於 1989 年，總部位於德州休士頓。

info.description: Devon Energy Corp. engages in the exploration, development, and production of oil and natural gas properties. It develops and operates Delaware Basin, Eagle Ford, Heavy Oil, Barnett Shale, STACK, and Rockies Oil. The company was founded by J. Larry Nichols and John W. Nichols in 1971 and is headquartered in Oklahoma City, OK.
info.industry_zh: 石油和天然氣勘探與生產
info.description_zh: Devon Energy Corp. 從事石油和天然氣資產的勘探、開發和生產。它開發和經營特拉華盆地、伊格爾福特、重油、巴尼特頁岩、STACK 和落基山脈石油。該公司由 J. Larry Nichols 和 John W. Nichols 於 1971 年創立，總部位於俄克拉荷馬州俄克拉荷馬市。

info.description: The Coca-Cola Co. engages in the manufacturing and marketing of non-alcoholic beverages. It operates through the following segments: Europe, Middle East and Africa, Latin America, North America, Asia Pacific, Global Ventures, and Bottling Investments. The company was founded by Asa Griggs Candler on May 8, 1886 and is headquartered in Atlanta, GA.
info.description_zh: 可口可樂公司從事非酒精飲料的製造和行銷。該公司透過以下部門營運：歐洲、中東和非洲、拉丁美洲、北美、亞太地區、全球創投和裝瓶投資。該公司由 Asa Griggs Candler 於 1886 年 5 月 8 日創立，總部位於喬治亞州亞特蘭大。

info.description: Altria Group, Inc. is a holding company, which engages in the manufacture and sale of cigarettes in the United States. It operates through the following segments: Smokeable Products, Oral Tobacco Products, and All Other. The Smokeable Products segment consists of cigarettes manufactured and sold by PM USA, and machine-made large cigars and pipe tobacco manufactured and sold by Middleton. The Oral Tobacco Products segment includes MST and snus products manufactured and sold by USSTC, and oral nicotine pouches manufactured and sold by Helix. The All Other segment refers to the financial results of NJOY, Helix ROW, and the IQOS System heated tobacco business. The company was founded in 1919 and is headquartered in Richmond, VA.
info.description_zh: 奧馳亞集團有限公司是一家控股公司，在美國從事捲菸的製造和銷售。它透過以下部門運作：吸煙產品、口服菸草產品和所有其他部門。可吸菸產品部門包括 PM USA 生產和銷售的捲菸以及 Middleton 生產和銷售的機制大雪茄和鬥煙。口服菸草產品部門包括 USSTC 生產和銷售的 MST 和鼻煙產品，以及 Helix 生產和銷售的口服尼古丁袋。所有其他部門是指 NJOY、Helix ROW 和 IQOS 系統加熱菸草業務的財務表現。該公司成立於 1919 年，總部位於維吉尼亞州里士滿。

info.description: Packaging Corporation of America engages in the production of containerboard products and a producer of uncoated freesheet paper in North America. It operates through the following segments: Packaging, Paper, and Corporate and Other. The Packaging segment offers a variety of corrugated packaging products, such as conventional shipping containers. The Paper segment manufactures and sells a range of papers, including communication-based papers, and pressure sensitive papers. The Corporate and Other segment focuses on transportation assets, such as rail cars, and trucks. The company was founded in 1959 and is headquartered in Lake Forest, IL.
info.description_zh: 美國包裝公司在北美從事箱板紙產品的生產和無塗層自由張紙的生產商。它透過以下部門運作：包裝部門、造紙部門、企業及其他部門。包裝部門提供各種瓦楞包裝產品，例如傳統的貨櫃。紙張部門生產和銷售一系列紙張，包括通訊紙和壓敏紙。企業及其他部門專注於運輸資產，例如軌道車和卡車。該公司成立於 1959 年，總部位於伊利諾伊州森林湖。

info.description: The J. M. Smucker Co. engages in the manufacture and marketing of food and beverage products. It operates through the following segments: U.S. Retail Coffee, U.S. Retail Frozen Handheld and Spreads, U.S. Retail Pet Foods, and Sweet Baked Snacks. The U.S. Retail Coffee segment includes the domestic sales of Folgers, Dunkin', and Cafe Bustelo branded coffee. The U.S. Retail Frozen Handheld and Spreads segment focuses on domestic sales of Smucker's and Jif branded products. The U.S. Retail Pet Foods segment is involved in the domestic sales of Meow Mix, Milk-Bone, Pup-Peroni, and Canine Carry Outs branded products. The Sweet Baked Snacks segment refers to all domestic and foreign sales of Hostess and Voortman branded products in all channels. The company was founded by Jerome Monroe Smucker in 1897 and is headquartered in Orrville, OH.
info.description_zh: J. M. Smucker Co. 從事食品和飲料產品的製造和行銷。該公司透過以下部門營運：美國零售咖啡部門、美國零售冷凍手持設備和塗抹醬部門、美國零售寵物食品部門和甜烘焙零食部門。美國零售咖啡部門包括 Folgers、Dunkin' 和 Cafe Bustelo 品牌咖啡的國內銷售。美國零售冷凍手持設備和塗抹醬部門專注於 Smucker's 和 Jif 品牌產品的國內銷售。美國零售寵物食品部門從事 Meow Mix、Milk-Bone、Pup-Peroni 和 Canine Carry Outs 品牌產品的國內銷售。甜烤零食板塊是指Hostess和Voortman品牌產品在所有通路的國內外銷售。該公司由 Jerome Monroe Smucker 於 1897 年創立，總部位於俄亥俄州奧爾維爾。

info.description: Ventas, Inc. engages in the acquisition and ownership of seniors housing and healthcare properties. It operates through the following segments: Senior Housing Operating Portfolio (SHOP), Outpatient Medical and Research Portfolio (OM&R), and Triple-net Leased Properties (NNN). The SHOP segment is involved in owning and investing in senior housing communities throughout the United States and Canada. The OM&R segment refers to acquiring, owning, development, leasing and managing outpatient medical buildings and research centers throughout the United States. The NNN segment focuses on investing and owning senior housing communities, skilled nursing facilities, long-term acute care facilities, freestanding inpatient rehabilitation facilities, and other healthcare facilities throughout the United States and the United Kingdom. The company was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Chicago, IL.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 醫療保健設施
info.description_zh: Ventas, Inc. 從事老年人住房和醫療保健財產的收購和所有權。該公司透過以下部門營運：高級住房營運部門（SHOP）、門診醫療和研究部門（OM&R）以及三網租賃物業（NNN）。 SHOP 部門參與擁有和投資美國和加拿大各地的老年住房社區。 OM&R 部門是指收購、擁有、開發、租賃和管理美國各地的門診醫療建築和研究中心。 NNN 部門專注於在美國和英國投資和擁有高級住房社區、熟練護理設施、長期急診設施、獨立住院復健設施以及其他醫療設施。該公司成立於 1983 年，總部位於伊利諾州芝加哥。

info.description: Loews Corp. is a holding company, which engages in the business of commercial property and casualty insurance, transportation and storage of natural gas and natural gas liquids, and operation of a chain of hotels. It operates through the following segments: CNA Financial, Boardwalk Pipelines, Loews Hotels and Co, and Corporate. The CNA Financial segment is involved in the sale of property and casualty insurance products and services, including surety, primarily through a network of independent agents, brokers, and managing general underwriters. The Boardwalk Pipelines segment focuses on midstream portion of the natural gas and NGLs industry, providing transportation, and storage for those commodities. The Loews Hotels and Co segment refers to a chain of hotels, which are in the United States and one of which is in Canada. The Corporate segment consists of investment income from the parent company's cash and investments, parent company interest expense, and other unallocated parent company expenses. The company was founded by Laurence A. Tisch and Preston Robert Tisch on November 12, 1969 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.industry_zh: 保險 - 財產與意外傷害
info.description_zh: Loews Corp.是一家控股公司，從事商業財產和傷亡保險、天然氣和天然氣液體運輸和儲存以及連鎖飯店經營業務。該公司透過以下部門營運：CNA Financial、Boardwalk Pipelines、Loews Hotels and Co 和 Corporate。 CNA Financial 部門主要透過獨立代理人、經紀人和管理總承保人組成的網絡，從事財產和意外保險產品和服務的銷售，包括保證。 Boardwalk Pipelines 部門專注於天然氣和液化天然氣行業的中游部分，為這些商品提供運輸和儲存。 Loews Hotels and Co 部門是指一家連鎖飯店，其位於美國，其中一家位於加拿大。公司部門包括母公司現金和投資的投資收入、母公司利息支出以及其他未分配的母公司支出。該公司由 Laurence A. Tisch 和 Preston Robert Tisch 於 1969 年 11 月 12 日創立，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: Johnson Controls International Plc engages in the provision of building products, energy solutions, integrated infrastructure and next generation transportation systems. Its products and solutions include fire detection and suppression, security, HVAC equipment, building automation and controls, digital, industrial refrigeration, residential and smart home, retail, distributed energy storage, and batteries. The company was established in 1885 and is headquartered in Cork, Ireland.
info.description_zh: 江森自控國際有限公司致力於提供建築產品、能源解決方案、綜合基礎設施和下一代交通系統。其產品和解決方案包括火災偵測和滅火、安全、暖通空調設備、樓宇自動化和控制、數位、工業冷凍、住宅和智慧家居、零售、分散式能源儲存和電池。該公司成立於1885年，總部位於愛爾蘭科克。

info.description: Union Pacific Corp. engages in the provision of railroad and freight transportation service. It delivers the goods families and businesses use every day with safe, reliable and efficient service. The company connects its customers and communities to the global economy. Union Pacific was founded on July 1, 1862 and is headquartered in Omaha, NE.
info.description_zh: Union Pacific Corp. 從事提供鐵路和貨運服務。它以安全、可靠和高效的服務為家庭和企業提供日常使用的物品。該公司將其客戶和社區與全球經濟聯繫起來。聯合太平洋公司成立於 1862 年 7 月 1 日，總部位於內布拉斯加州奧馬哈。

info.description: Philip Morris International, Inc. is a holding company, which engages in the business of delivering a smoke-free future and evolving a portfolio for the long term to include products outside of the tobacco and nicotine sector. It operates through the following geographical segments: Europe Region (Europe), South and Southeast Asia, Commonwealth of Independent States, Middle East, and Africa Region (SSEA, CIS, and MEA), East Asia, Australia, and PMI Global Travel Retail (EA, AU, and PMI GTR), and Americas Region (Americas). The Europe segment includes all the European Union countries, Switzerland, the United Kingdom, Ukraine, Moldova, and Southeast Europe. The SSEA, CIS, and MEA segment focuses on South and Southeast Asia, the African continent, the Middle East, Turkey, Israel, Central Asia, Caucasus, and Russia. The EA, AU, and PMI GTR segment is involved in the consolidation of international duty-free business with East Asia and Australia. The Americas segment consists of the United States, Canada, and Latin America. The company was founded by Philip Morris in 1847 and is headquartered in Stamford, CT.
info.description_zh: 菲利普莫里斯國際公司是一家控股公司，致力於打造無菸未來，並長期發展產品組合以涵蓋菸草和尼古丁產業以外的產品。該公司透過以下地理區域開展業務：歐洲區域（Europe）、南亞和東南亞、獨立國家聯合體、中東和非洲區域（SSEA、CIS和MEA）、東亞、澳洲和PMI全球旅遊零售（EA、AU和PMI GTR）以及美洲區域（Americas）。歐洲部分包括所有歐盟國家、瑞士、英國、烏克蘭、摩爾多瓦和東南歐。 SSEA、獨立國協和中東和非洲部分則聚焦在南亞和東南亞、非洲大陸、中東、土耳其、以色列、中亞、高加索和俄羅斯。 EA、AU 和 PMI GTR 部門參與與東亞和澳洲的國際免稅業務的整合。美洲部分包括美國、加拿大和拉丁美洲。該公司由菲利普莫里斯 (Philip Morris) 於 1847 年創立，總部位於康乃狄克州斯坦福。

info.description: Rollins, Inc. is an international services company, which engages in the provision of pest and termite control services. Its service offerings include Residential, Commercial, and Termite. The company was founded by John W. Rollins Jr. and O. Wayne Rollins Sr. on February 24, 1948 and is headquartered in Atlanta, GA.
info.description_zh: Rollins, Inc. 是一家國際服務公司，提供害蟲和白蟻防治服務。其服務產品包括住宅、商業和白蟻。該公司由 John W. Rollins Jr. 和 O. Wayne Rollins Sr. 於 1948 年 2 月 24 日創立，總部位於喬治亞州亞特蘭大。

info.description: Edwards Lifesciences Corp. engages in patient-focused medical innovations for heart disease and critical care monitoring. Its products are categorized into four main areas: Transcatheter Aortic Valve Replacement, Transcatheter Mitral and Tricuspid Therapies, Surgical Structural Heart, and Critical Care. It operates through the following geographical segments: United States, Europe, Japan, and Rest of World. The company was founded by Miles Lowell Edwards in 1958 and is headquartered in Irvine, CA.
info.description_zh: Edwards Lifesciences Corp. 致力於以患者為中心的心臟病和重症監護監測醫療創新。其產品分為四個主要領域：經導管主動脈瓣置換術、經導管二尖瓣和三尖瓣治療、外科結構性心臟和重症監護。它透過以下地理區域開展業務：美國、歐洲、日本和世界其他地區。該公司由 Miles Lowell Edwards 於 1958 年創立，總部位於加州歐文。

info.description: Salesforce, Inc. engages in the design and development of cloud-based enterprise software for customer relationship management. Its solutions include sales force automation, customer service and support, marketing automation, digital commerce, community management, collaboration, industry-specific solutions, and salesforce platform. The firm also provides guidance, support, training, and advisory services. The company was founded by Marc Russell Benioff and Parker Harris in 1999 and is headquartered in San Francisco, CA.
info.description_zh: Salesforce, Inc. 從事用於客戶關係管理的基於雲端的企業軟體的設計和開發。其解決方案包括銷售團隊自動化、客戶服務和支援、行銷自動化、數位商務、社群管理、協作、行業特定解決方案和銷售團隊平台。該公司還提供指導、支援、培訓和諮詢服務。該公司由 Marc Russell Benioff 和 Parker Harris 於 1999 年創立，總部位於加州舊金山。

info.description: Quest Diagnostics, Inc. engages in the provision of diagnostic testing, information, and services. It operates through the Diagnostic Information Services (DIS) and All Other segments. The DIS segment offers diagnostic information services to physicians, hospitals, patients, and consumers. The All Other segment consists of risk assessment services and healthcare information technology. The company was founded in 1967 and is headquartered in Secaucus, NJ.
info.description_zh: Quest Diagnostics, Inc. 從事提供診斷測試、資訊和服務。它透過診斷資訊服務（DIS）和所有其他部門運作。 DIS 部門為醫生、醫院、病患和消費者提供診斷資訊服務。所有其他部門包括風險評估服務和醫療保健資訊科技。該公司成立於 1967 年，總部位於新澤西州錫考克斯。

info.description: Autodesk, Inc. engages in the design of software and services. Its products include AutoCAD, BIM Collaborate Pro, Revit, Civil 3D, Fusion 360, InfraWorks, Inventor, Maya, PlanGrid, Revit, Shotgun, and 3ds Max. The firm also offers product development and manufacturing software, which provides manufacturers in the automotive, transportation, industrial machinery, consumer products, and building product industries with digital design, engineering, and production solutions. The firm is also involved in digital media and entertainment, which consists of tools for digital sculpting, modeling, animation, effects, rendering, and compositing for design visualization, visual effects, and games production. The company was founded by John Walker in April 1982 and is headquartered in San Francisco, CA.
info.description_zh: Autodesk, Inc. 從事軟體和服務設計。其產品包括 AutoCAD、BIM Collaborate Pro、Revit、Civil 3D、Fusion 360、InfraWorks、Inventor、Maya、PlanGrid、Revit、Shotgun 和 3ds Max。該公司還提供產品開發和製造軟體，為汽車、運輸、工業機械、消費品和建築產品行業的製造商提供數位設計、工程和生產解決方案。該公司還涉足數位媒體和娛樂領域，其中包括用於設計視覺化、視覺效果和遊戲製作的數位雕刻、建模、動畫、效果、渲染和合成工具。該公司由 John Walker 於 1982 年 4 月創立，總部位於加州舊金山。

info.description: HP Inc. is an information technology company, which engages in the provision of personal computing and other access devices, imaging and printing products, and related technologies, solutions, and services. It operates through the following segments: Personal Systems, Printing, and Corporate Investments. The Personal Systems segment offers commercial and consumer desktop and notebook personal computers, workstations, thin clients, commercial tablets and mobility devices, retail point-of-sale systems, displays and other related accessories, software, support, and services for the commercial and consumer markets. The Printing segment provides consumer and commercial printer hardware, supplies, solutions and services, and scanning devices. The Corporate Investments segment includes HP Labs and certain business incubation projects. The company was founded by William R. Hewlett and David Packard in 1939 and is headquartered in Palo Alto, CA.
info.description_zh: 惠普公司是一家資訊科技公司，從事提供個人運算和其他存取設備、影像和列印產品以及相關技術、解決方案和服務。它透過以下部門運作：個人系統、印刷和企業投資。個人系統部門為商業和消費市場提供商業和消費桌上型和筆記型個人電腦、工作站、瘦客戶端、商用平板電腦和行動裝置、零售銷售點系統、顯示器和其他相關配件、軟體、支援和服務。列印部門提供消費者和商業印表機硬體、耗材、解決方案和服務以及掃描設備。企業投資部門包括惠普實驗室和某些企業孵化項目。該公司由 William R. Hewlett 和 David Packard 於 1939 年創立，總部位於加州帕洛阿爾托。

info.description: Thomson Reuters Corp. engages in the provision of news and information for professional markets. It operates through the following segments: Legal Professionals, Corporates, Tax and Accounting Professionals, Reuters News, and Global Print. The Legal Professionals segment provides research and workflow products to law firms and government. The Corporates segment serves corporate customers with full suite of content-enabled technology solutions for in-house legal, tax, regulatory, compliance, and information technology professionals. The Tax and Accounting Professionals segment offers research and workflow products focusing on intuitive tax offerings and automating tax workflows to tax, accounting, and audit professional in accounting firms. The Reuters News segment supplies business, financial, national, and international news to professionals via desktop terminals. The Global Print segment offers legal and tax information primarily in print format to customers around the world. The company was founded in 1799 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
info.description_zh: 湯森路透公司致力於為專業市場提供新聞和資訊。該公司透過以下部門營運：法律專業部門、企業部門、稅務和會計專業部門、路透社新聞部門和全球印刷部門。法律專業人員部門向律師事務所和政府提供研究和工作流程產品。企業部門為企業客戶提供全套內容支援的技術解決方案，供內部法律、稅務、監管、合規和資訊科技專業人員使用。稅務和會計專業人士部門為會計師事務所的稅務、會計和審計專業人士提供研究和工作流程產品，並專注於直觀的稅務產品和自動化稅務工作流程。路透社新聞部門透過桌面終端向專業人士提供商業、金融、國內和國際新聞。全球印刷部門主要以印刷形式向世界各地的客戶提供法律和稅務資訊。該公司成立於1799年，總部位於加拿大多倫多。

info.description: Palantir Technologies, Inc. engages in the business of building and deploying software platforms that serve as the central operating systems for its customers. It operates through the Commercial and Government segments. The Commercial segment focuses on customers working in non-government industries. The Government segment is involved in providing services to customers that are the United States government and non-United States government agencies. Its platforms are widely used in areas such as defense, intelligence, healthcare, energy, and financial services, supporting data integration, large-scale analytics, and operational decision-making. The company was founded by Alexander Ceadmon Karp, Peter Andreas Thiel, Stephen Cohen, Joseph Lonsdale, and Nathan Dale Gettings in 2003 and is headquartered in Aventura, FL.
info.description_zh: Palantir Technologies, Inc. 從事建置和部署作為客戶中央作業系統的軟體平台的業務。它透過商業和政府部門運作。商業部門專注於非政府產業的客戶。政府部門為美國政府和非美國政府機構的客戶提供服務。其平台廣泛應用於國防、情報、醫療保健、能源和金融服務等領域，支援數據整合、大規模分析和營運決策。該公司由 Alexander Ceadmon Karp、Peter Andreas Thiel、Stephen Cohen、Joseph Lonsdale 和 Nathan Dale Gettings 於 2003 年創立，總部位於佛羅裡達州阿文圖拉。

info.description: ServiceNow, Inc. engages in the provision of an end-to-end workflow automation platform for digital businesses. Its Now Platform is a cloud-based solution embedded with artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML). The company was founded by Frederic B. Luddy in June 2004 and is headquartered in Santa Clara, CA.
info.description_zh: ServiceNow, Inc. 致力於為數位企業提供端到端工作流程自動化平台。其 Now 平台是一個基於雲端的解決方案，嵌入了人工智慧 (AI) 和機器學習 (ML)。該公司由 Frederic B. Luddy 於 2004 年 6 月創立，總部位於加州聖克拉拉。

info.description: Comcast Corp. engages in the provision of video, Internet, and phone services. It operates through the following segments: Residential Connectivity and Platforms, Business Services Connectivity, Media, Studios, and Theme Parks. The Residential Connectivity and Platforms segment consists of residential broadband and wireless services and Sky-branded entertainment television networks and advertising. The Business Service Connectivity segment offers broadband, wireline voice and wireless services through small to medium customers and large enterprises through the HFC network. The Media segment consists of NBCUniversal's television and streaming platforms, including national, regional, and international cable networks. The Studios segment focuses on NBCUniversal's film and television studio production and distribution operations. The Theme Parks segment operates Universal theme parks in Orlando, Florida, Hollywood, California, Osaka, Japan, and Beijing, China. The company was founded by Ralph Roberts in 1963 and is headquartered in Philadelphia, PA.
info.description_zh: Comcast Corp. 提供視訊、網路和電話服務。它透過以下部門運作：住宅連接和平台、商業服務連接、媒體、工作室和主題公園。住宅連接和平台部門包括住宅寬頻和無線服務以及Sky品牌的娛樂電視網路和廣告。商業服務連接部門透過 HFC 網路為中小型客戶和大型企業提供寬頻、有線語音和無線服務。媒體部門由 NBCUniversal 的電視和串流媒體平台組成，包括國家、地區和國際有線電視網絡。工作室部門專注於 NBCUniversal 的電影和電視工作室製作和發行業務。主題樂園部門在佛羅裡達州奧蘭多、加州好萊塢、日本大阪和中國北京經營環球主題樂園。該公司由 Ralph Roberts 於 1963 年創立，總部位於賓夕法尼亞州費城。

info.description: Assurant, Inc. engages in the provision of lifestyle and housing solutions for consumer purchases. It operates through the following segments: Global Lifestyle, Global Housing, and Corporate and Other. The Global Lifestyle segment offers mobile device solutions and extended service products and related services for mobile devices, consumer electronics and appliances, vehicle protection, and related services. The Global Housing segment includes lender-placed homeowners' insurance, lender-placed manufactured housing insurance, lender-placed flood insurance, renters' insurance, and related products, voluntary manufactured housing insurance, voluntary homeowners' insurance and other specialty products. The Corporate and Other segment refers to the corporate employee-related expenses and activities of the holding company. The company was founded in 1892 and is headquartered in Atlanta, GA.
info.industry_zh: 保險 - 財產與意外傷害
info.description_zh: Assurant, Inc. 致力於為消費者購買提供生活方式和住房解決方案。該公司透過以下部門運營：全球生活方式部門、全球住房部門以及企業及其他部門。全球生活風格部門為行動裝置、消費性電子和電器、車輛保護及相關服務提供行動裝置解決方案和擴展服務產品及相關服務。全球住房部門包括貸方放置的房屋保險、貸方放置的製造型房屋保險、貸方放置的洪水保險、租屋者保險及相關產品、自願型製造房屋保險、自願型房屋保險和其他特色產品。公司及其他部門是指控股公司與公司員工相關的費用和活動。該公司成立於 1892 年，總部位於喬治亞州亞特蘭大。

info.description: Diamondback Energy, Inc. is an independent oil and natural gas company, which engages in the acquisition, development, exploration, and exploitation of unconventional, onshore oil, and natural gas reserves. It operates through the Upstream and Midstream Services segments. The Upstream segment focuses on the Permian Basin operations in West Texas. The Midstream Services segment is involved in the Midland and Delaware Basins. The company was founded in December 2007 and is headquartered in Midland, TX.
info.industry_zh: 石油和天然氣勘探與生產
info.description_zh: Diamondback Energy, Inc.是一家獨立的石油和天然氣公司，從事非常規、陸上石油和天然氣儲量的收購、開發、勘探和開採。它透過上游和中游服務部門運作。上游部門專注於德克薩斯州西部的二疊紀盆地業務。中游服務部門涉及米德蘭和特拉華盆地。該公司成立於2007年12月，總部位於德克薩斯州米德蘭。

info.description: MSCI, Inc. engages in the provision of investment decision support tools including indices, portfolio risk and performance analytics and corporate governance products and services. It operates through the following segments: Index, Analytics, ESG and Climate, and All Other-Private Assets. The Index segment focuses on the investment process, including developing indexed financial products. The Analytics segment offers risk management, performance attribution and portfolio management content, applications, and services. The ESG and Climate segment includes providing data, ratings, research, and tools to help investors navigate increasing regulation, meet new client demands and better integrate ESG and climate elements into their investment processes. The All Other-Private Assets segment refers to the business intelligence products to real estate owners, managers, developers, and brokers. The company was founded by Andrew Thomas Rudd in 1998 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.industry_zh: 財務數據和證券交易所
info.description_zh: MSCI, Inc. 從事提供投資決策支援工具，包括指數、投資組合風險和績效分析以及公司治理產品和服務。它透過以下部門運作：指數部門、分析部門、ESG 和氣候部門以及所有其他私人資產部門。指數部門專注於投資過程，包括開發指數金融產品。分析部門提供風險管理、績效歸因和投資組合管理內容、應用程式和服務。 ESG 和氣候部門包括提供數據、評級、研究和工具，以幫助投資者應對日益嚴格的監管、滿足新的客戶需求以及更好地將 ESG 和氣候要素融入其投資流程。所有其他私人資產部分是指為房地產所有者、管理者、開發商和經紀人提供的商業智慧產品。該公司由 Andrew Thomas Rudd 於 1998 年創立，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: Walmart, Inc. engages in the retail and wholesale business. The company offers an assortment of merchandise and services at everyday low prices. It operates through the following business segments: Walmart U.S., Walmart International, and Sam's Club. The Walmart U.S. segment operates as a mass merchandiser of consumer products, operating under the Walmart and Walmart Neighborhood Market brands, including walmart.com. The Walmart International segment includes operations of wholly-owned subsidiaries in Canada, Chile, China, and Africa, and majority-owned subsidiaries in India, as well as Mexico and Central America. The Sam's Club segment manages membership-only warehouse clubs and operates samsclub.com. The company was founded by Samuel Moore Walton and James Lawrence Walton on July 2, 1962 and is headquartered in Bentonville, AR.
info.description_zh: 沃爾瑪公司從事零售和批發業務。該公司以每日低價提供各種商品和服務。它透過以下業務部門運作：沃爾瑪美國公司、沃爾瑪國際公司和山姆會員店。沃爾瑪美國部門是一家消費性產品批發商，以沃爾瑪和沃爾瑪鄰里市場品牌經營，包括 walmart.com。沃爾瑪國際部門包括在加拿大、智利、中國和非洲的全資子公司以及在印度、墨西哥和中美洲的控股子公司。山姆會員店部門管理會員制倉儲俱樂部並經營 samsclub.com。該公司由 Samuel Moore Walton 和 James Lawrence Walton 於 1962 年 7 月 2 日創立，總部位於阿肯色州本頓維爾。

info.description: Fortinet, Inc. provides cybersecurity solutions to a variety of businesses, such as enterprises, communication service providers, government organizations, and small to medium-sized businesses. Its product portfolio includes network security, secure access service edge, enterprise networking, security operations, application security, and operational technology. The company was founded by Ken Xie and Michael Xie in October 2000 and is headquartered in Sunnyvale, CA.
info.description_zh: Fortinet, Inc. 為各種企業提供網路安全解決方案，例如企業、通訊服務提供者、政府組織和中小型企業。其產品組合包括網路安全、安全存取服務邊緣、企業網路、安全營運、應用安全和營運技術。該公司由 Ken Xie 和 Michael Xie 於 2000 年 10 月創立，總部位於加州桑尼維爾。

info.description: Dover Corp. operates as a manufacturer and solutions provider delivering innovative equipment and components, consumable supplies, aftermarket parts, software and digital solutions, and support services. It operates through the following segments: Engineered Products, Clean Energy and Fueling, Imaging and Identification, Pumps and Process Solutions, and Climate and Sustainability Technologies. The Engineered Products segment provides various equipment, components, software, solutions and services to the vehicle aftermarket, aerospace and defense, industrial winch and hoist, precision soldering and fluid dispensing end-markets. The Clean Energy and Fueling segment focuses on the components, equipment, software, solutions and services enabling safe and reliable storage, transport and dispensing of traditional and clean fuels, cryogenic gases, and other hazardous substances along the supply chain, and safe and efficient operation of convenience retail, retail fueling and vehicle wash establishments, as well as facilities where cryogenic gases are produced, stored or consumed. The Imaging and Identification segment supplies precision marking and coding, product traceability, brand protection and digital textile printing equipment, as well as related consumables, software and services to the global packaged and consumer goods, pharmaceutical, industrial manufacturing, textile and other end-markets. The Pumps and Process Solutions segment consists of specialty pumps and flow meters, highly engineered precision components for rotating and reciprocating machines, fluid connecting solutions and plastics and polymer processing equipment, serving single-use biopharmaceutical production, diversified industrial manufacturing, chemical production, plastics and polymer processing, midstream and downstream oil and gas and other end markets. The Climate and Sustainability Technologies segment refers to innovative and energy-efficient equipment, components and parts for the commercial refrigeration, equipment and systems, heating and cooling, and beverage can-making equipment markets. The company was founded by George L. Ohrstrom in 1947 and is headquartered in Downers Grove, IL.
info.description_zh: Dover Corp. 是一家製造商和解決方案提供商，提供創新設備和組件、消耗品、售後零件、軟體和數位解決方案以及支援服務。該公司透過以下部門運作：工程產品部門、清潔能源和燃料部門、成像和識別部門、泵浦和製程解決方案部門以及氣候和永續發展技術部門。工程產品部門為汽車售後市場、航空航太和國防、工業絞車和起重機、精密焊接和流體點膠終端市場提供各種設備、組件、軟體、解決方案和服務。清潔能源和燃料部門專注於組件、設備、軟體、解決方案和服務，以實現供應鏈上傳統和清潔燃料、低溫氣體和其他危險物質的安全可靠的儲存、運輸和分配，以及便利零售、零售加油和洗車設施以及低溫氣體生產、儲存或消費設施的安全和高效運作。影像和識別部門為全球包裝和消費品、製藥、工業製造、紡織和其他終端市場提供精密標記和編碼、產品可追溯性、品牌保護和數位紡織印刷設備以及相關耗材、軟體和服務。泵浦和製程解決方案部門包括特種泵浦和流量計、用於旋轉和往復式機器的高度工程化的精密零件、流體連接解決方案以及塑膠和聚合物加工設備，服務於一次性生物製藥生產、多元化工業製造、化學品生產、塑膠和聚合物加工、中游和下游石油和天然氣以及其他終端市場。氣候和永續發展技術部門是指用於商業冷凍、設備和系統、加熱和冷卻以及飲料罐製造設備市場的創新和節能設備、零件。該公司由 George L. Ohrstrom 於 1947 年創立，總部位於伊利諾伊州唐納斯格羅夫。

info.description: Constellation Energy Corp. engages in the generation, supply, and marketing of clean electricity, and renewable energy products and solutions. The firm also offers wholesale energy, retail products and services. It operates under the following geographical segments: Mid-Atlantic, Midwest, New York, Electric Reliability Council of Texas (ERCOT), and Other Power Regions Segment. The company was founded in 1960 and is headquartered in Baltimore, MD.
info.industry_zh: 公用事業 - 獨立電力生產商
info.description_zh: Constellation Energy Corp. 從事清潔電力以及再生能源產品和解決方案的生產、供應和行銷。該公司還提供批發能源、零售產品和服務。該公司在以下地理區域運作：中大西洋、中西部、紐約、德州電力可靠性委員會 (ERCOT) 和其他電力區域部門。該公司成立於 1960 年，總部位於馬裡蘭州巴爾的摩。

info.description: Adobe, Inc. is a global technology company, which engages in the provision of digital marketing and media solutions. It operates through the following segments: Digital Media, Digital Experience, and Publishing and Advertising. The Digital Media segment offers products and services that enable individuals, teams, businesses, and enterprises to create, publish, and promote content anywhere and accelerate productivity by transforming view, share, engage with and collaborate on documents and creative content. The Digital Experience segment focuses on integrated platform and set of products, services, and solutions that enable businesses to create, manage, execute, measure, monetize, and optimize customer experiences that span from analytics to commerce. The Publishing and Advertising segment includes legacy products and services that address diverse market opportunities, including eLearning solutions, technical document publishing, web conferencing, document and forms platform, web app development, high-end printing, and Adobe Advertising offerings. The company was founded by Charles M. Geschke and John E. Warnock in December 1982 and is headquartered in San Jose, CA.
info.description_zh: Adobe, Inc. 是一家全球科技公司，致力於提供數位行銷和媒體解決方案。它透過以下部門運作：數位媒體、數位體驗以及出版和廣告。數位媒體部門提供的產品和服務使個人、團隊、企業和企業能夠在任何地方創建、發布和推廣內容，並透過改變文件和創意內容的視圖、共享、參與和協作來提高生產力。數位體驗部門專注於整合平台和產品、服務和解決方案集，使企業能夠創建、管理、執行、衡量、貨幣化和優化從分析到商業的客戶體驗。出版和廣告部門包括滿足不同市場機會的傳統產品和服務，包括電子學習解決方案、技術文件發布、網路會議、文件和表單平台、網路應用程式開發、高端印刷和 Adob​​e 廣告產品。該公司由 Charles M. Geschke 和 John E. Warnock 於 1982 年 12 月創立，總部位於加州聖荷西。
